and you are downloading all the printouts now if you are doing the unbranded printouts and you want to attach your logo your gym logo on there Unless you have Adobe Pro It's really tough to find a good reliable source to get that all done on it this one right here is a pretty easy to use and I mean you can do a lot of stuff with PDF Go to sedgeda.com sejda.com And then once you're here at the homepage For branding it you're gonna want to click edit And then it'll take you to the PDF editor give it a second to load up here All right, and then in the case of the Joey Huber Packets they're actually really big files, so there's 70 pages total and that takes a minute to upload a minute to download So just you gotta be patient with this, but if you're editing any PDFs that are 10 pages are under It's gonna load up really really quickly So in this case, I'm gonna edit the 1.25 meal plan packet and I've already messed around with it But I'm gonna start it fresh so that's why I just clicked this card, but you won't have that message come up for you It'll just upload a brand new PDF. So Right we're just gonna wait a second for it to load up here And then I've already messed around with this and tried Branding it so it'll have my logo right there already, but in your case you're gonna want to click new image and Then you're gonna basically want to find your gym logo Select that and then it'll pop up right here and once you click that you just literally drag it. It's super easy Drag it resize it boom and then go down to the next page and we gotta give it a second to load up here And then same thing you just come to images boom It's gonna be right there and then you do this basically for every page that you want to brand So you might not want to brand all of it, but that's totally up to you. There's no Set guideline or anything on how many pages you can brand. It's just however many would want branded So I would at least do the first two pages because that's the meal plan and Then just go through it. It's I'm not gonna make a video going through 70 pages So We'll just go through these two and then we'll apply the changes. So once you're finished come down right here Click apply changes and this part takes a really long time since again, it's 70 pages So I'm gonna pause the video right now and then once it's finished. I'll play it back All right, we're back so it took about five minutes to get to this page where it's allowing me to download it finally and Just give it some time be patient with it. It's it's a free tool that You would end up paying over a hundred dollars for for Adobe pro and you're only gonna use it once or twice So this is another alternative for our brand and once it is finished uploading And it's done you just click download and it re downloads your PDF and then you have a branded PDF So enjoy.
